top_articles.title: Hackers Exploit Critical Everest Forms Pro WordPress Plugin Flaw to Take Over Sites

top_articles.title: Cisco Patches CVE-2026-20230 in Unified CM as Exploit Code Goes Public
top_articles.summary: Cisco has patched a bug in Unified Communications Manager that lets an unauthenticated attacker on the network write files to the box and, from there, climb to root.   It is tracked as CVE-2026-20230

top_articles.title: Chrome 149 Patches 429 Vulnerabilities
top_articles.summary: Over 100 bugs are critical or high-severity, mainly use-after-free and insufficient validation of untrusted input flaws.

top_articles.title: Cisco Warns of 7th SD-WAN Zero-Day Exploited in 2026
top_articles.summary: The vulnerability is tracked as CVE-2026-20245 and it can allow arbitrary command execution as root, but no patch yet.

top_articles.title: CISA Adds Exploited Magento RCE Flaw CVE-2026-45247 to KEV Catalog
top_articles.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Wednesday added  a critical flaw impacting Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a popular Magento full-page cache extension, to its Known Exploite

top_articles.title: Cisco Warns of Available PoC for Critical Unified CM Vulnerability
top_articles.summary: The high-severity flaw can be exploited remotely, without authentication, in server-side request forgery (SSRF) attacks.

top_articles.title: Cisco warns of critical Unified CM flaw with PoC exploit code
top_articles.summary: Cisco has released security updates to patch a critical-severity Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM) flaw that allows attackers to gain root privileges.

top_articles.title: Beyond the Zero-Day: See Your Network Like an Attacker | Webinar with HD Moore

top_articles.title: Acer working to patch max severity zero-days in Wave 7 routers
top_articles.summary: Acer is working to address two maximum-severity zero-day vulnerabilities affecting its Wave 7 mesh routers.

top_articles.title: Critical Vulnerability in HP VoIP Phones Enables Enterprise Network Breaches
top_articles.summary: A stack-based buffer overflow bug can be exploited for remote code execution on a vulnerable device.
